notes: All 5 leaf worker audits completed. Copilot task tool returned results synchronously; no background agent ids were available, so telemetry uses inline-* placeholders.
consensus: CI and smoke coverage focus heavily on shell linting + launcher scaffolding; they do not validate real metaswarm commander/worker behavior or telemetry in practice.
Docs contain multiple internal inconsistencies that can mislead users about install artifacts, branch naming, and merge ordering.
conflicts: AGENTS.md branch naming and merger ordering contradict README.
blockers: Smoke test requires tmux; CI does not currently run smoke-test.sh and would fail without tmux server setup.
Smoke test uses banned child model (claude-haiku-4.5) in its single-agent path.
